    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AutoModeUserAction
    User action to start auto mode (automatic proof search).
    class 
    FocussedAutoModeUserAction
    User action for "Apply rules automatically here" (i.e.
    class 
    ProofLoadUserAction
    Virtual user action to undo loading a proof.
    class 
    ProofMacroUserAction
    User action to apply a proof macro.
    class 
    ProofModifyingUserAction
    User action that modifies the proof in some way.
    class 
    ProofRuleUserAction
    User action that represents the manual application of a rule.
    class 
    RunStrategyOnNodeUserAction
    User action to start auto mode on a specific goal.
    class 
    SMTProofApplyUserAction
    User action to apply the results of running SMT solvers.
